name: Everything MCP Server - MCP Official Example
notes: This MCP server attempts to utilize all the functions of the MCP protocol. It is not intended to be a practical/useful server; instead, it serves as a test server for developers of MCP clients. It implements features such as prompts, tools, resources, and sampling to demonstrate the capabilities of MCP.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the Streamable HTTP Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the Streamable HTTP Protocol.
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the SSE Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the SSE Protocol.
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the STDIO Protocol - MCP Official Example
notes:
This is a quick access example for AutoNavi Maps MCP Server (Map Control Protocol Server) via the STDIO Protocol (Standard Input/Output Protocol).
To obtain the KEY (API Key): Please visit the AutoNavi Open Platform Console (URL: https://lbs.amap.com/api/mcp-server/create-project-and-key). If you do not have a developer account yet, please register as a developer first.

name: Python 3.12 - venv/pip - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
notes: Python 3.12 Standard (venv) - SSE: Best for web deployment. Uses built-in venv and pip with HTTP SSE transport.

name: Python 3.12 - venv/pip - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source venv/bin/activate && exec python server/main.py --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
notes: Python 3.12 Standard (venv) - Stdio: Best for MCP client integration. Uses stdio transport.

name: Python 3.12 - Poetry - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && poetry env use python && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install
notes: Python 3.12 Engineering (Poetry) - SSE: For production web projects requiring strict dependency locking.

name: Python 3.12 - Poetry - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && poetry env use python && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"poetry","args":["run","python","server/main.py","--transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
notes: Python 3.12 Engineering (Poetry) - Stdio: For MCP client integration with strict dependency locking.

name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - Streamable-HTTP
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.11 && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
notes: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - Streamable-HTTP: For fastest setup and efficient HTTP streaming.

name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.11 && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
notes: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - SSE: For fastest setup and web serving.

name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.11 && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source .venv/bin/activate && exec python server/main.py --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
notes: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - Stdio: For fastest setup and MCP client integration.

name: Python 3.10 - Global/pip - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.10 && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","pyenv local 3.10 && exec python server/main.py --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
notes: Python 3.10 Global - Stdio: For Docker/CI. Installs directly to system path.

name: Node.js 20 - npm - SSE
init_script: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install
notes: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE: Recommended for production web services. Uses NVM and npm.

name: Node.js 20 - npm - Stdio
init_script: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
mcp_servers: {"mcpServers": {"default": {"command": "sh", "args": ["-c", "cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio"]}}}
notes: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - Stdio: For MCP client integration. Runs directly with node to avoid npm noise.

name: Node.js 22 - pnpm - SSE
init_script: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 22 && nvm use 22 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pnpm install
notes: Node.js 22 Latest (pnpm) - SSE: For high performance web builds using pnpm.

name: Node.js 22 - pnpm - Stdio
init_script: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 22 && nvm use 22 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pnpm install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
mcp_servers: {"mcpServers": {"default": {"command": "sh", "args": ["-c", "cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio"]}}}
notes: Node.js 22 Latest (pnpm) - Stdio: For high performance MCP client integration.

name: Node.js - Direct - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install
notes: Node.js Direct - SSE: Uses system Node.js without nvm. For pre-configured environments.

name: Node.js - Direct - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"node","args":["index.js","--transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json
notes: Node.js Direct - Stdio: Uses system Node.js. Direct execution.

name: Binary - Linux - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && chmod +x mcp-sys-monitor-linux
notes: Linux AMD64 Binary - SSE: Standalone executable web server. No dependencies required.

name: Binary - Linux - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && chmod +x mcp-sys-monitor-linux
notes: Linux AMD64 Binary - Stdio: Minimalist standalone executable for MCP clients.

name: Binary - Linux - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && chmod +x mcp-sys-monitor-linux
notes: Linux AMD64 Binary - SSE: Standalone executable web server. No dependencies required.

name: Binary - Linux - Stdio
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && chmod +x mcp-sys-monitor-linux
notes: Linux AMD64 Binary - Stdio: Minimalist standalone executable for MCP clients.

name: Shell - Custom Script - SSE
init_script: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && chmod +x *.sh && ./install.sh
notes: Custom Shell Script - SSE: Encapsulates logic via install.sh/start.sh. Path-aware.
